use_cases: Display user notifications in an overlay popover
Show alert messages and system updates with interactive actions
Enable notification management with mark-as-read functionality
Provide quick access to unread messages in dashboard contexts
Deliver in-app communication alerts with state management
ai_summary: A notification popover component that displays notifications in an overlay format with interactive states for viewing, dismissing, and managing alerts. Designed for dashboard and application contexts where users need centralized notification access with proper accessibility support.
